sections.paragraph:
adj.-

(1) wicked, unrighteous, Gen 18:23 Job 9:24 15:20 20:29 Psa 1:1, , , 3:8 7:10 9:18 11:6 and very frequently. Opposed to צַדִּיק. Sometimes (but however, rarely) used of the Gentiles (גֹּויִם) as oppressing the Israelites (עֲנִיִּים), Isa 14:5 Psa 9:6 compare רֶשַׁע Psa 84:11 125:3 and Greek ἄνομοι of the Gentiles, 1Ma_2:44 3:5 Act 2:23.

(2) having an unrighteous cause (in a forensic sense), Exo 23:7 Deu 25:1.

(3) guilty, liable to punishment, Gen 18:23, 25 Gen 18:25. רָשָׁע לָמוּת guilty of death, Num 35:31.
